wtfCommit.autoCommit.description: Automatically commit changes after generating the message.

wtfCommit.autoPush.description: Automatically push changes after commit (requires autoCommit to be enabled).

wtfCommit.smartStage.description: Automatically stage all changes if nothing is staged.

wtfCommit.confirmBeforeCommit.description: Show a confirmation dialog before auto-committing.

wtfCommit.prompt.default:
You are an expert software developer. Generate a clear and concise Git commit message based on the provided diff.

Rules:
1. Use conventional commit format: <type>(<scope>): <description>
2. Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, ci, build
3. Keep the first line under 72 characters. If necessary, add a blank line and a bulleted list for details.
4. Use imperative mood (e.g., 'add' not 'added')
5. Focus on WHAT changed and WHY, not HOW
6. CRITICAL: If a new file is created (especially documentation or features), it MUST be mentioned in the description.
7. If multiple changes exist, prioritize the most significant impact (e.g., "add Chinese documentation" is more significant than "add link").
8. Only output the commit message, nothing else.

wtfCommit.language.description: Language for the generated commit message

wtfCommit.customLanguage.description: Enter your target language (only used when Language is set to 'Custom'). e.g. 'French', 'Emoji only', 'Cantonese'.

wtfCommit.baseUrl.description: Global API Base URL (Fallback). Leave empty to use the provider's default.
wtfCommit.baseUrl.markdownDescription:
Global API Base URL (Fallback). Used if the provider-specific Base URL is not set. Leave empty to use the provider's default.

**Defaults:**
- OpenAI: `https://api.openai.com/v1`
- DeepSeek: `https://api.deepseek.com`
- MiniMax: `https://api.minimaxi.com/v1`
- Moonshot: `https://api.moonshot.cn/v1`
- GLM: `https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4`
- Gemini: `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai`
- OpenRouter: `https://openrouter.ai/api/v1`

> **Note:** Use the input box below to enter a custom Base URL if needed.

wtfCommit.model.description: Global Model name (Fallback). Leave empty to use the provider's default.
wtfCommit.model.markdownDescription:
Global Model name (Fallback). Used if the provider-specific Model is not set. Leave empty to use the provider's default.

**Defaults:**
- OpenAI: `gpt-5-nano`
- DeepSeek: `deepseek-chat`
- MiniMax: `MiniMax-M2.5`
- Moonshot: `kimi-k2-turbo-preview`
- GLM: `glm-5`
- Gemini: `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview`
- OpenRouter: `openrouter/free`

> **Note:** Use the input box below to enter a custom Model name if needed.

wtfCommit.OpenAI.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Custom Base URL specifically for **OpenAI**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.baseUrl`.

wtfCommit.OpenAI.model.markdownDescription: Custom Model specifically for **OpenAI**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.model`.

wtfCommit.GLM.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Custom Base URL specifically for **GLM**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.baseUrl`.

wtfCommit.GLM.model.markdownDescription: Custom Model specifically for **GLM**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.model`.

wtfCommit.Gemini.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Custom Base URL specifically for **Gemini**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.baseUrl`.

wtfCommit.Gemini.model.markdownDescription: Custom Model specifically for **Gemini**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.model`.

wtfCommit.OpenRouter.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Custom Base URL specifically for **OpenRouter**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.baseUrl`.

wtfCommit.Custom.model.markdownDescription: Custom Model specifically for **Custom**. Overrides the global `wtfCommit.model`.

scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
scripts.publish:ovsx: sh -c 'if [ -n "$OVSX_PAT" ]; then ovsx publish "wtf-commit-${npm_package_version}.vsix" --pat "$OVSX_PAT"; else ovsx publish "wtf-commit-${npm_package_version}.vsix"; fi'
scripts.release: pnpm run package && pnpm run publish:ovsx
